{{ $json.job.ThreadSummary ?? (($json.related?.email ?? []) .map(e => (e.ThreadSummary ?? '').trim()) .find(s => s.length > 0)) ?? '' }}
{{ ($json.related?.email ?? []).map((email, idx) => { const headingId = `emailHeading${idx}`; const collapseId = `emailCollapse${idx}`; const dateText = email.ReceivedDate ? new Date(email.ReceivedDate).toLocaleString('en-GB', { dateStyle: 'medium', timeStyle: 'short' }) : ''; const esc = (s) => String(s ?? '') .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"') .replace(/'/g, '''); const bodyHtml = email.BodyHtml ?? esc(email.Body ?? '').replace(/\n/g, '
'); return `

${email.OutlookUrl ? ` Open email ` : ''} ${email.ThreadUrl ? ` Open thread ` : ''}
From:
${esc(email.From)}
Subject:
${esc(email.Subject)}
Id:
${esc(email.id)}
${bodyHtml}
`; }).join('') }}

Quote lines
Compact grid editor with expandable markdown details
# Name Sale Cost Hours Optional Actions

{{ ($json.related?.quote ?? []).map((quote, idx) => { const headingId = `quoteHeading${idx}`; const collapseId = `quoteCollapse${idx}`; const esc = (s) => String(s ?? '') .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"') .replace(/'/g, '''); const md = (s) => esc(s) .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '$1') .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '$1') .replace(/\n/g, '
'); const parseNumber = (v) => { if (typeof v === 'number') return Number.isFinite(v) ? v : 0; const cleaned = String(v ?? '') .replace(/[^0-9.\-]/g, '') .trim(); const n = Number(cleaned); return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0; }; const q = quote.QuoteObject ?? {}; const lines = Array.isArray(q.lines) ? q.lines : []; const currency = q.currency ?? 'GBP'; const money = (v) => new Intl.NumberFormat('en-GB', { style: 'currency', currency }).format(parseNumber(v)); const isIncludedInTotal = (line) => { if (!line?.optional) return true; // Support a few possible include flags for optional lines if (line.included === true) return true; if (line.include === true) return true; if (line.isIncluded === true) return true; if (line.selected === true) return true; if (line.accepted === true) return true; return false; }; const calculatedTotals = lines.reduce((acc, line) => { if (!isIncludedInTotal(line)) return acc; acc.saleTotal += parseNumber(line.salePrice); acc.expectedHoursTotal += parseNumber(line.expectedHours); return acc; }, { saleTotal: 0, expectedHoursTotal: 0 }); const rows = lines.map((l) => { const included = isIncludedInTotal(l); return ` ${esc(l.name)}
${md(l.descriptionMarkdown)} ${l.optional ? `
(optional${included ? ' - included' : ' - excluded'})
` : ''} ${l.caveatsMarkdown ? `
${md(l.caveatsMarkdown)}
` : ''} ${money(l.salePrice)} ${parseNumber(l.expectedHours) || ''} `; }).join(''); return `

${q.introMarkdown ? `
${md(q.introMarkdown)}
` : ''}
${rows}
Description Price Hours
Total ${money(calculatedTotals.saleTotal)} ${calculatedTotals.expectedHoursTotal || ''}
${q.termsMarkdown ? `
${md(q.termsMarkdown)}
` : ''}
`; }).join('') }}

{{ (() => { const quote = ($json.related?.quote ?? []).at(-1) ?? {}; const q = quote.QuoteObject ?? {}; const esc = (s) => String(s ?? '') .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"') .replace(/'/g, '''); const md = (s) => esc(s) .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '$1') .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '$1') .replace(/\n/g, '
'); const parseNumber = (v) => { if (typeof v === 'number') return Number.isFinite(v) ? v : 0; const cleaned = String(v ?? '') .replace(/[^0-9.\-]/g, '') .trim(); const n = Number(cleaned); return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0; }; const money = (v) => { const n = parseNumber(v); return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-GB', { style: 'currency', currency: q.currency ?? 'GBP' }).format(n); }; const lines = Array.isArray(q.lines) ? q.lines : []; // Initial displayed totals are based on all lines being included. const initialTotal = lines.reduce((sum, line) => { return sum + parseNumber(line.salePrice); }, 0); const initialHours = lines.reduce((sum, line) => { return sum + parseNumber(line.expectedHours); }, 0); return `
${ quote.ID ? `
${esc(q.title ?? quote.Title ?? 'Quote')}
Version ${esc(q.versionLabel ?? '') || '1'}
${money(initialTotal)}
${esc(initialHours)} hour(s)
${ q.introMarkdown ? `
${md(q.introMarkdown)}
` : '' } ${ lines.length ? `
${lines.map((line, idx) => ` `).join('')}
Description Price
${esc(line.name ?? '')}
${line.descriptionMarkdown ? `
${md(line.descriptionMarkdown)}
` : ''} ${line.optional ? `
Optional item
` : ''} 		${money(line.salePrice)}
Total (excluding VAT) ${money(initialTotal)}
` : '' } ${ q.termsMarkdown ? `
Terms / notes
${md(q.termsMarkdown)}
` : '' }
` : `
No quote is available for response.
` }
Please choose a response
You can accept this quote or send a question/comment back to the team.
Use this if you want clarification or changes before approving.
`; })() }}

{{ (() => { const related = $json.related ?? {}; const HIGGINS_DOMAIN = 'higginslettings.co.uk'; const emails = Array.isArray(related.email) ? related.email : []; const attachments = Array.isArray(related.attachment) ? related.attachment : []; const notes = Array.isArray(related.note) ? related.note : []; const quotes = Array.isArray(related.quote) ? related.quote : []; const completions = Array.isArray(related.completion) ? related.completion : []; const files = Array.isArray(related.file) ? related.file : []; const esc = (s) => String(s ?? '') .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"') .replace(/'/g, '''); const stripHtml = (s) => String(s ?? '').replace(/<[^>]*>/g, ' '); const oneLine = (s) => String(s ?? '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const clip = (s, len = 80) => { const t = oneLine(stripHtml(s)); return t.length > len ? `${t.slice(0, len - 1)}…` : t; }; const fmtDate = (value) => { if (!value) return 'No timestamp'; const d = new Date(value); if (Number.isNaN(d.getTime())) return esc(String(value)); return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-GB', { day: '2-digit', month: 'short', year: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }).format(d); }; const isHigginsAddress = (email) => { const e = String(email ?? '').trim().toLowerCase(); return e.endsWith(`@${HIGGINS_DOMAIN}`); }; const sideFromAddress = (email, fallback = 'right') => { if (!email) return fallback; return isHigginsAddress(email) ? 'right' : 'left'; }; const mailTitle = (m) => clip(m.Subject || m.Title || 'Email', 100); const noteTitle = (n) => clip(n.Note || n.Title || 'Note', 80); const quoteTitle = (q) => { const qo = q.QuoteObject ?? {}; const version = qo.versionLabel ?? q.QuoteVersion ?? ''; const base = qo.title || q.Title || 'Quote'; return version !== '' ? `${base} (v${version})` : base; }; const completionTitle = (c) => clip(c.Title || c.Description || 'Completion report', 100); const normaliseSuffix = (value) => String(value ?? '').trim().replace(/^\/+|\/+$/g, ''); const fileMatchesSuffix = (file, suffix) => { const sfx = normaliseSuffix(suffix); if (!sfx) return false; const parentPath = String(file.parentPath ?? '').trim().replace(/\/+$/, ''); if (!parentPath) return false; return parentPath.endsWith(`/${sfx}`) || parentPath.endsWith(sfx); }; const filesForItem = (item) => { const suffix = normaliseSuffix(item.FolderSuffix); if (!suffix) return []; return files.filter(f => fileMatchesSuffix(f, suffix)); }; const renderFileLinks = (fileList) => { if (!Array.isArray(fileList) || !fileList.length) return ''; return `
${fileList.map(f => ` ${esc(f.name || 'File')} ${f.sizeText ? `${esc(f.sizeText)}` : ''} `).join('')}
`; }; const attachmentLinksHtml = attachments.length ? `
${attachments.map(a => ` ${esc(a.name || 'Attachment')} `).join('')}
` : ''; const items = [ ...emails.map(m => ({ type: 'email', badge: 'E', badgeClass: 'email', side: sideFromAddress(m.From, 'left'), timestamp: m.ReceivedDate ?? m.Created ?? null, sortTs: (m.ReceivedDate ?? m.Created) ? new Date(m.ReceivedDate ?? m.Created).getTime() : 0, title: mailTitle(m), meta: m.From ? `From ${m.From}` : '', body: clip(m.Body || m.BodyHtml || '', 220), url: m.OutlookUrl || m.ThreadUrl || '', fileCount: attachments.length, extraHtml: attachmentLinksHtml })), ...notes.map(n => { const matchedFiles = filesForItem(n); return { type: 'note', badge: 'N', badgeClass: 'note', side: sideFromAddress(n.From, 'right'), timestamp: n.Created ?? null, sortTs: n.Created ? new Date(n.Created).getTime() : 0, title: noteTitle(n), meta: [ n.From ? `From ${n.From}` : '', n.Urgent ? 'Urgent' : '', matchedFiles.length ? `${matchedFiles.length} file${matchedFiles.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}` : '' ].filter(Boolean).join(' • '), body: clip(n.Note || '', 220), url: '', fileCount: matchedFiles.length, extraHtml: renderFileLinks(matchedFiles) }; }), ...quotes.map(q => { const qo = q.QuoteObject ?? {}; const totals = qo.totals ?? {}; const sale = typeof totals.saleTotal === 'number' ? new Intl.NumberFormat('en-GB', { style: 'currency', currency: qo.currency || 'GBP' }).format(totals.saleTotal) : ''; const matchedFiles = filesForItem(q); return { type: 'quote', badge: 'Q', badgeClass: 'quote', side: 'right', timestamp: q.Created ?? null, sortTs: q.Created ? new Date(q.Created).getTime() : 0, title: quoteTitle(q), meta: [ sale ? `Total ${sale}` : '', matchedFiles.length ? `${matchedFiles.length} file${matchedFiles.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}` : '' ].filter(Boolean).join(' • '), body: clip(qo.introMarkdown || '', 220), url: '', fileCount: matchedFiles.length, extraHtml: renderFileLinks(matchedFiles) }; }), ...completions.map(c => { const matchedFiles = filesForItem(c); return { type: 'completion', badge: 'C', badgeClass: 'completion', side: 'right', timestamp: c.Created ?? null, sortTs: c.Created ? new Date(c.Created).getTime() : 0, title: completionTitle(c), meta: matchedFiles.length ? `${matchedFiles.length} file${matchedFiles.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}` : '', body: clip(c.Description || c.Summary || '', 220), url: '', fileCount: matchedFiles.length, extraHtml: renderFileLinks(matchedFiles) }; }) ].sort((a, b) => { const aTs = Number.isFinite(a.sortTs) && a.sortTs > 0 ? a.sortTs : Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER; const bTs = Number.isFinite(b.sortTs) && b.sortTs > 0 ? b.sortTs : Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER; return bTs - aTs; }); const itemHtml = items.map((item, i) => { const sideClass = item.side === 'left' ? 'is-left' : 'is-right'; const detailsId = `hgsTl${i + 1}`; return `
${esc(fmtDate(item.timestamp))} ${esc(item.title)} ${ item.fileCount ? ` ${item.fileCount} ` : '' }
${item.meta ? `
${esc(item.meta)}
` : ''} ${item.body ? `
${esc(item.body)}
` : ''} ${item.extraHtml || ''} ${ item.url ? `
Open
` : '' }
${esc(item.badge)}
`; }).join(''); return `
${itemHtml || `
No timeline items found.
`}
`; })() }}
